$comment: Layer C for TABSUM vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (OCCURS O1/O2, docs/occurs.md). The four ACCEPTs fill table cells W-VAL(1..4) at input positions 0..3 (domain W-VAL, PIC 9(4)V99). The PERFORM VARYING loop unrolls I=1..4; each W-VAL(I) resolves to a definite cell, so W-TOTAL is the affine sum of the four inputs and the 2% fee rounding half-boundary is an affine obligation the engine solves directly.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 TABSUM (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-tabsum)
